description_long: This is a tall, freestanding floor lamp with a rectangular, softbox-style shade mounted on an adjustable telescopic pole. The lamp features a wide, stable tripod base with three legs extending outward for support. The shade is made of a matte, opaque material, likely fabric or plastic, designed to diffuse light evenly. The pole appears to be constructed from metal, with visible adjustment joints for height modification. The lamp's overall design is utilitarian and minimal, with no visible decorative embellishments. It is suitable for use in urban environments such as studios, garages, or public facilities where functional lighting is required.
description: A tall, tripod-based floor lamp with a rectangular softbox shade and adjustable metal pole, designed for functional, diffused lighting.
description_view_0: Side view showing the triangular profile of the softbox shade and the full height of the adjustable pole and tripod base.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full rectangular face of the shade and the symmetrical tripod base.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the angled softbox shade and the extended tripod legs.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the rectangular shade and the tripod base from behind.
